children.characters: "Reviewed the procurement justification and vendor comparison. Excavator utilisation rates at Rajasthan site support this capex. Vendor risk noted — clause inserted for delivery penalty. Approved with condition."
Budget commitment successfully posted to SAP S/4HANA. Purchase Requisition generated. Funds earmarked against cost centre CC-MN-04 and GL 4310020. Vendor master record VND-00541 attached.
Approval completion notifications sent to all stakeholders. Email + in-app notifications delivered.
New spend request raised for procurement of 1× Komatsu PC390LC-11 hydraulic excavator for the Rajasthan Mining operations site. Submitted via web portal with 3 supporting documents.
Escalated to CFO — Dual Sign-off Required

Request automatically routed to the dual sign-off queue per Policy Rule #P-CAP-047: "Capital expenditure requests exceeding ₹1,00,00,000 require CFO countersignature." Assigned to: Priya Nair (CFO) and Sudhir Mehta (DGM Finance).
Approved by CFO — Dual Sign-off Complete
"Capex aligns with Q4 mining expansion plan. Vendor performance concern acknowledged — Sudhir's penalty clause is appropriate. Dual sign-off complete. Release budget and initiate SAP commitment."

Validation completed in 2.7s. 4 of 6 checks passed. 1 policy violation detected (single-approval limit exceeded). 1 vendor risk flag raised. Recommended action: Conditional Approval — route to CFO for dual sign-off.
Automated validation initiated within 3 seconds of request submission. Running 6-point compliance check against policy ruleset v2024-Q4.

Vedanta Limited — Mining Operations Division, Rajasthan
Supply of PC390LC-11 Hydraulic Excavator with 2-Year AMC
Delivery Lead Time: 6–8 weeks from PO date. Payment Terms: 40% advance, 60% on delivery. Warranty: 12 months / 2,000 operating hours. AMC available at ₹8,50,000/year.

children.characters: RE: Capex Request — Excavator Procurement, Rajasthan Site

I have reviewed the site utilisation report and the downtime analysis for Q3. The current excavator fleet at the Rajasthan site is operating at 94% utilisation — adding one additional unit is both operationally justified and critical for Q4 production targets.
This should go to the CFO queue given the amount. Please keep me copied on the final approval.

I am providing my pre-approval for you to raise this formal capital expenditure request through the BudgetPlan system. Please ensure the Komatsu quote is attached and that delivery penalties are included in the PO terms given their track record last quarter.
Uploaded by Arvind Maheshwari • 15 Mar 2026, 08:14 IST • 1.8 MB • SHA-256: 9e4c7b…d2f0a8
